name: Maito Gai (S)
description: Team 9's Professor is back! Gai improved his techniques and strength much more. And now he will use all possible techniques to defeat Akatsuki. Whether releasing Hachimon Tonkou or using extreme taijutsu techniques.

skills.name: Gai Nunchaku Style
skills.description: Gai deals 10 damage to one enemy for 3 turns. Whenever an enemy uses a new physical or melee skill on him, they will take 15 damage. During this time, the target of this skill will receive 10 additional damage from 'Reactive Taijutsu Rampage'.

skills.name: Reactive Taijutsu Rampage
skills.description: Gai deals 25 damage to one enemy. This skill cannot be countered or reflected.

skills.name: Gate Release
skills.description: Gai release one gate per turn, gaining 10% unpierceable damage reduction and increasing by 5 the initial damage of his skills each turn for 6 turns. During this time, he will take 5 affliction damage and cannot be healed.This skill becomes 'Asakuujaku' permanently.

skills.name: Muscle Block
skills.description: This skill makes Maito Gai (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Asakuujaku
skills.description: Gai deals 15 piercing damage and 10 affliction damage to one enemy and stuns their skills for 1 turn. This skill cannot be countered or reflected.
